definitions: Damage Per Second: A measure of the average amount of damage inflicted by an attack or weapon in one second, commonly used in video games.
Department of Public Safety: A government agency responsible for public safety, often including law enforcement, highway patrol, and emergency management.
Data Processing System: A system, typically computerized, used for processing data.
examples: The new patch significantly increased the DPS of the mage class.
The DPS officer pulled over the speeding car.
Our company implemented a new DPS for managing customer information.
